note: Declarative allow-list of (dimension, operation) pairs. Symbolic only — no numeric delta is implied. An operation not listed under a dimension is INVALID and must be rejected (never silently coerced) by both the compatibility schema check and runtime rule validation.

rationale.capacity: capacity is grown or drained: strengthen/weaken and nourish/deplete; transform may transmute it.
rationale.coherence: coherence is steadied or scattered: stabilize/destabilize; transform may transmute it.
rationale.expression: expression is opened, narrowed or shut: release/restrict/block; transform may transmute it.
rationale.regulation: regulation either contains or is overrun: regulate/overwhelm; transform may transmute it.
rationale.tendency: tendency is an orientation label only: classify/orient. No strengthen/weaken vocabulary and no aggregation.
